query: SELECT setting_key, setting_value, LENGTH(setting_value) as value_length FROM system_settings WHERE setting_key IN ('orders_enabled', 'reservations_enabled', 'events_enabled') ORDER BY setting_key;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2acBjedGBUZUvzs.4f77da611348 --database 6g8xxhsNMKiXF83cS8YGfP --execute SELECT setting_key, setting_value, LENGTH(setting_value) as value_length FROM system_settings WHERE setting_key IN ('orders_enabled', 'reservations_enabled', 'events_enabled') ORDER BY setting_key;
stdout:
setting_key	setting_value	value_length
events_enabled	true	4
orders_enabled	false	5
